outlook.summary: Market is in a positive gamma environment (Long Gamma) with spot pinned near the 0DTE and Monthly Gamma Flip. Dealers will suppress volatility, selling rips and buying dips. Expect price action to gravitate towards the 655 Max Pain magnet.

0DTE Gamma Flip aligns tightly with Monthly Flip (654). Spot is hovering at this equilibrium point.
